properties.sfomuseum:description: Amenity kit issued by ANA (All Nippon Airlines) for business class service; co-branded to promote Nealss Yard Remedies product; unused; in multiple parts:a. blue amenity kit cover with top zipper closure;b. sleep mask;c-d. sealed in plastic bag, toothbrush, toothpaste;e. sealed plastic bag, earplugs;f. hand cream;g. lip balm;h. bottle of facial mist;i. product brochure.
properties.sfomuseum:medium: fabric, plastic, metal, cosmetic products, foam, paper, ink
